authorities.title: Guidance for Industry: Action Level for Inorganic Arsenic in Apple Juice
notes: Official final FDA action-level guidance for inorganic arsenic in apple juice.

authorities.title: CPG Sec. 540.600 Fish, Shellfish, Crustaceans and other Aquatic Animals - Fresh, Frozen or Processed - Methyl Mercury
notes: Official FDA compliance policy guide used as the U.S. methylmercury legal anchor for fish and other aquatic animals.
